violations.text: The presence of fruit flies is not controlled as evidenced by live activity. The presence of mice is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to clean any and all droppings/effected areas using appropriate means of sanitization. Per PIC, pest control services have been increased to weekly until pest problem is completely under control. Establishment is to continue to work with pest control to eliminate pest problem. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025
The 1 door reach-in freezer gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the bar coolers have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025
The bottom wall in the kitchen area has a hole in the foundation. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Establishment is to patch hole. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025

The presence of fruit flies is not controlled as evidenced by live activity. The presence of mice is not controlled as evidenced by an accumulation of droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to clean any and all droppings/effected areas using appropriate means of sanitization. Establishment is to work with pest control to eliminate pest problem and is to have a pest control report available for inspector at the time of the next inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025
The 1 door freezer gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the bar coolers have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025

The floor in the walk-in cooler area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2025
The bottom wall in the kitchen area has a hole in the foundation. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Establishment is to patch hole. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be washed and sanitized. PIC voluntarily disposed of ice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

The following non-food contact surfaces observed with debris: 1.walk in cooler gaskets have soil residue and other debris. 2.small bakers rack observed with food debris. 3.freezers and food storage shelves in offsite storage area have an accumulation of debris and food residue. 4.ceilings in walk in cooler observed with dust. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024
The plumbing to the hand sink in the kitchen was observed in poor repair. Leak observed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024

The floors throughout the kitchen and walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the outside back area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024
